overall.description: A nighttime ship bridge simulation showing navigation through coastal waters toward a harbor. The first-person view from the bridge displays operational radar, chart plotters, and the illuminated bow of the vessel as it moves through dark waters, rendered in a game engine.

agents.ego_description: operating the ship's navigation systems from the bridge, monitoring radar and chart displays while proceeding through the channel

entered.detail: navigation display showing chart with colored depth contours and restricted zones
circular radar display with rotating sweep showing surrounding contacts
blue sonar depth display showing water column profile
forward deck of the vessel with red navigation lights visible
metal safety railing at the front of the bridge
white foam wake becoming visible along the starboard side as the ship moves

segments.scene_description: The scene shows a first-person perspective from a ship's bridge at night, with three navigation monitors displaying chart, radar, and sonar data. The vessel moves steadily through dark waters toward the open sea or harbor entrance, with the illuminated bow visible ahead and wake forming on the starboard side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady first-person perspective from a ship's bridge as the vessel navigates through dark coastal waters toward a distant harbor. It begins with a view of three glowing navigation monitors displaying real-time chart, radar, and sonar data. As the ship advances, the camera looks past the consoles to the illuminated bow cutting through the night. The scene then focuses on the vessel's steady momentum, with a white wake churning along the starboard side as it moves further into the open sea.
